title: TFC Ambiental Refreshed
body:
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RVuHApuv/images/8b5aae25d7e4f4a0de9c84eca90e4faf9284481b.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RVuHApuv/images/8b5aae25d7e4f4a0de9c84eca90e4faf9284481b.png)

Available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tfc-ambiental-refreshed) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tfc-ambiental-refreshed)

Requires: [TFC Ambiental](https://modrinth.com/mod/tfc-ambiental)

### 📖About



TFC Ambiental Refreshed is a Resource Pack, that updates the visuals of TFC Ambiental, so that they are closer to the modern minecraft art style. This resource pack is made in style of Vexxed Visuals TFC, so the color palettes match well (I highly recommend playing with it for better overall experience).

While this resourcepack is made specifically for the Terra Draconis modpack, you can use it even outside it for any of your TFC adventures!



### 💬 Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this resource pack in modpacks and use it in your videos. A link to the mod page in the description is highly appreciated.

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this resource pack to any other websites/launchers/apps, use textures in other projects, put this mod behind any adfly-like links, sell this resource pack in any way or include in paid modpacks - this resource pack is free for all players.
